subject: Q1 Planning Meeting
body:
Hi team,

I'd like to schedule a Q1 planning meeting.

Date: 2026-04-01
Time: 10:00 AM
Duration: 90 minutes
Participants: bob@techcorp.com, carol@techcorp.com

Please confirm your availability.

Best,
Alice

subject: Re: Project Update
body:
Hi Alice,

Thanks for the update on the project. The numbers look good. I'll review the detailed report and get back to you by Friday.

Cheers,
Dave

subject: Sprint Retrospective
body:
Hello everyone,

Let's have our sprint retrospective meeting.

Date: 2026-04-03
Time: 2:00 PM
Duration: 60 minutes
Participants: alice@techcorp.com, carol@techcorp.com, dave@techcorp.com

We'll cover what went well and areas for improvement.

Thanks,
Bob

subject: Lunch next week?
body:
Hey Alice,

Want to grab lunch next week? I was thinking Tuesday or Wednesday. Let me know what works for you!

Carol

subject: Office Closure Notice
body:
Dear team,

Please note that the office will be closed on April 10th for maintenance. Please plan to work from home that day.

Regards,
Eve (Office Admin)

subject: Design Review Session
body:
Hi Bob and Eve,

I'm scheduling a design review session for the new feature.

Date: 2026-04-07
Time: 11:30 AM
Duration: 45 minutes
Participants: bob@techcorp.com, eve@techcorp.com

Please come prepared with your wireframes.

Best,
Dave

subject: Re: Budget Approval
body:
Dave,

The budget has been approved. You can proceed with the vendor negotiations. Let me know if you need any supporting documents.

Alice

subject: Client Demo Preparation
body:
Hi all,

We need to prepare for the upcoming client demo.

Date: 2026-04-10
Time: 3:00 PM
Duration: 120 minutes
Participants: alice@techcorp.com, bob@techcorp.com, dave@techcorp.com, eve@techcorp.com

Please have your demo segments ready.

Thanks,
Carol

subject: FYI: Conference Talks
body:
Alice,

Just forwarding the list of conference talks that might be interesting for the team. See attached PDF.

Bob

subject: Re: Vacation Request
body:
Hi Carol,

Your vacation request for April 20-24 has been approved. Enjoy your time off!

Best,
Eve
